topic: Tenses Part 1 — Present Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous)
keyPointsSummary: Present Continuous: happening now (I am eating rice)
Present Perfect: completed action with present relevance (I have eaten rice)
Present Perfect Continuous: ongoing action from past till now (I have been eating rice for an hour)

quickQuiz.hindi: मैं अभी खाना खा रहा हूँ।
quickQuiz.answer: I am eating food right now.

quickQuiz.hindi: मैं एक घंटे से पढ़ रहा हूँ।
quickQuiz.answer: I have been studying for an hour.

quickQuiz.hindi: वह हर दिन काम पर जाती है।
quickQuiz.answer: She goes to work every day.

quickQuiz.hindi: वह अभी काम कर रही है।
उसने अपना काम पूरा कर लिया है।
वह दो घंटे से काम कर रही है।
quickQuiz.answer: She has been working for two hours.
They go to school every day.

mustRememberRules: Present Continuous: happening now (I am eating rice)
Present Perfect: completed action with present relevance (I have eaten rice)
Present Perfect Continuous: ongoing action from past till now (I have been eating rice for an hour)
